mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY like_count DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (book_id, user_id, rating, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
